name: Chocolate Raspberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions.
2. Stir in 1/2 cup of chocolate chips.
3. Spoon the batter into two greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
4. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
5. Cool in the pans on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
6. Remove from the pans and cool completely.
7. Brush the tops of the layers with Chambord.
8. Place one layer on a serving plate and spread with jam.
9. Top with the second layer.
10. Melt the remaining chocolate chips over low heat, stirring often.
11. Remove from heat and gradually stir in sour cream.
12. Spread the mixture on top and sides of the cake.
13. Sprinkle the toasted pecans on top.
14. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.
